assertions.description: 68 total components, 213 nets, 21 power rails (including +/-12/24/36/48V, AC, Earth, GNDA, GND_CHASSIS, VBAT, VBUS, VCC) all correctly extracted. Component type breakdown matches the actual per-component types in the components list.

Y1 (Crystal) is correctly detected in signal_analysis.crystal_circuits. U1 (Generics:U_LDO_Fixed) is correctly detected as a power regulator with topology 'LDO'. OpAmp U2 (Generics:U_OPAMP) is detected as comparator_or_open_loop configuration.

This is a symbol library test sheet — all power rails are isolated single-symbol demos with no real drivers. The 20 pwr_flag_warnings are all valid for this context. The single_pin_nets list correctly flags isolated power symbols.
